subjects.description: Pink translucent jellyfish swimming through deep blue ocean water.
subjects.appearance_details: Bell shaped body glowing with vibrant pink hues, semi transparent membrane, trailing delicate tentacles, soft internal gradients visible in the light.
subjects.relationship: Single main jellyfish subject drifting above the ocean floor among distant marine life.
subjects.location: Midwater foreground, centered against a vast blue ocean with marine life and seabed far below.
subjects.relative_size: Medium in frame, larger than distant fish and coral details due to close camera position.
subjects.orientation: Bell facing upward with tentacles trailing downward, drifting diagonally through the water.
subjects.pose: Open bell form expanding and contracting rhythmically, tentacles flowing behind.
subjects.action: Pulsates and glides smoothly beneath shimmering filtered sunlight.
subjects.state_changes: Starts with bell expanded, pulses through the middle of the shot, ends drifting deeper as tentacles trail in a soft arc.
subjects.expression: No facial expression, serene and ethereal presence.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Translucent gelatinous pink tissue with luminous soft edges and smooth wet texture.
subjects.facial_features: No face, bell body and flowing tentacles define the form.

background_setting: Vast deep blue ocean with clear water, faint ocean floor, scattered marine life, soft coral shapes, and suspended particles adding depth.

lighting.conditions: Sunbeams filter down from the surface, shimmering through the water and glowing through the jellyfish body.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Sunbeams filter down from the surface, shimmering through the water and glowing through the jellyfish body.

aesthetics.composition: Ethereal, tranquil, luminous, delicate, minimal, graceful underwater beauty.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Ethereal, tranquil, luminous, delicate, minimal, graceful underwater beauty.

cinematography.camera_motion: Macro like underwater tracking shot with slow motion feel, camera gently follows the jellyfish from a slightly below angle.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: Realistic text to video underwater nature scene with high detail translucent motion.
artistic_style: Dreamlike cinematic realism with soft blue and pink color contrast.
context: A pink jellyfish moves through clear ocean water, illuminated by sunlight as distant marine life gives the scene depth.

actions.description: The jellyfish floats into view with its bell expanded and tentacles trailing through blue water.
It pulses rhythmically, each contraction pushing it forward as sunbeams shimmer across its pink body.
The jellyfish drifts calmly deeper into the frame while the ocean floor and small fish remain soft in the background.
